Solanum eleagnifolium, also known as Silver Pittosporum or Silver Horse Nettle, is a plant in the Solanum genus. It is a shrub-like perennial with oval-shaped leaves and clusters of small white flowers. The health benefits of Solanum eleagnifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma. The bioactive constituents of this plant include glycoalkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. Solanum eleagnifolium is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
